context.projectOverview: Bringing the multi-lens evaluator panel to the NATIVE Claude Code surface (markdown agents/commands/skills). Sprint 1 is the foundation: create the canonical panel reference markdown (single source of truth embedding the eval-lenses.ts fragments + documenting split fan-out / majority-vote / lensVerdicts), add an OPTIONAL lensVerdicts field to EvalResultSchema, and add a vitest drift gate tying the markdown to eval-lenses.ts. Zero runtime behavior change.

gitNote: The working tree has PRE-EXISTING uncommitted changes UNRELATED to this sprint (graph CLI: src/graph/cli.ts, src/cli/commands/graph.ts; agent .md files; .bober artifacts). When committing, stage ONLY the files you create/modify for THIS sprint with explicit paths: git add skills/shared/lens-panel.md src/contracts/eval-result.ts src/contracts/eval-result.test.ts src/orchestrator/lens-panel-parity.test.ts. NEVER run `git add -A` or `git add .`. Branch bober/evaluator-lens-panel (already checked out) — never main.
